name: vite-plugin-vue-pulse
description: Dev-only Vite plugin that visualizes Vue reactivity (ref/reactive/computed/watch/watchEffect + render effects) as a live, glowing dependency graph — static map + runtime traffic.

scripts.dev: npm run build && pnpm --filter playground dev
scripts.playground:build: npm run build && pnpm --filter playground build
scripts.analyze: npm run build && node dist/static/cli.js playground/src/App.vue
scripts.test: node test/tracer.test.mjs && node test/static.test.mjs && node test/plugin.test.mjs && node test/scale_cycle.test.mjs && node test/computed_setter.test.mjs && node test/external.test.mjs && node test/transform.test.mjs && node test/deep_writes.test.mjs && node test/component_render.test.mjs && node test/cross_component.test.mjs && node test/reconcile.test.mjs && node test/layout.test.mjs && node test/e2e_vite.test.mjs
scripts.prepack: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m "release: v%s" && npm publish && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m "release: v%s" && npm publish && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major -m "release: v%s" && npm publish && git push --follow-tags
